name: translat
description: Scaffold repository for the Translat desktop application.

scripts.check:scaffold: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const paths=['AGENTS.md','docs/architecture/system-overview.md','docs/runbooks/local-setup.md','src/README.md','tests/README.md','.agents/skills/README.md','notion/README.md']; const missing=paths.filter(p=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing scaffold paths: '+missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1)} console.log('Scaffold OK');"
scripts.build: node -e "console.log('Build pipeline not configured yet for scaffold stage.');"
